is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located about 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) to the west of the [town of Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)") and about 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) to the southeast of the village of [Heddal](/wiki/Heddal_(village) "Heddal (village)"). The river [Heddøla](/wiki/Hedd%C3%B8la "Heddøla") flows past the village just before emptying into the lake [Heddalsvatnet](/wiki/Heddalsvatnet "Heddalsvatnet") about 1.5 kilometres (0.93 mi) east of the village.[[3]](#cite_note-snl-3)

**Yli** is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located about 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) to the west of the [town of Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)") and about 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) to the southeast of the village of [Heddal](/wiki/Heddal_(village) "Heddal (village)"). The river [Heddøla](/wiki/Hedd%C3%B8la "Heddøla") flows past the village just before emptying into the lake [Heddalsvatnet](/wiki/Heddalsvatnet "Heddalsvatnet") about 1.5 kilometres (0.93 mi) east of the village.[[3]](#cite_note-snl-3)

The 0.24-square-kilometre (59-acre) village has a population (2022) of 291 and a [population density](/wiki/Population_density "Population density") of 1,198 inhabitants per square kilometre (3,100/sq mi).[[1]](#cite_note-ssb-1)

[Notodden Airport](/wiki/Notodden_Airport "Notodden Airport") and the [European route E134](/wiki/European_route_E134 "European route E134") highway are both located just north of the village.[[3]](#cite_note-snl-3)
